blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 19 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,705 ft. Looking ahead, 65 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 23" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
